'''Yin Wood Snake''' is the 42nd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 乙 Kinoto (yin wood, the luna-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 巳 Mi, the [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the stem's wood generates the branch's fire, a relationship of nourishment.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Wood Dragon]] (node 41) and [[Yang Fire Horse]] (node 43).

== Folk reading ==
Yin Wood Snake is the '''coup year''' — when sudden, decisive violence inside a court topples a powerful clan, or a hurried treaty surrenders the autonomy of a polity. The Snake hour at this stem is called the ''silent strike'' in court manuals.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoto (乙)]] — yin wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Snake (zodiac)|Snake (巳)]] — yin fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Wood Dragon]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Fire Horse]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q905031}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
